name: Python
description: Exploring Python as a replacement for SAS in daily data analysis and modeling. SAS is too old school, and frankly they don't seem too keen on Chinese users. /shrug

name: AI Agent
description: Claude Code + TRAE, paired with GLM/Kimi, has become the standard setup. For work, I've also been using the ancient Dify lately—surprisingly not bad.

name: Linux
description: Due to VPS deployment needs, I've been using Rocky Linux heavily lately. Ran into some issues, but I've grown to like it.

name: Mac
description: Fed up with the company PC, I've mostly moved my personal dev environment back to Mac. Ghostty + Claude Code + Codex is the main stack.
